verse_text: Now Satan stood up against Israel, and moved David to number Israel.

links.context: Despite the protestations of Joab, David decides to take a census of the people. According to the narrator, the Lord has incited David to do this. However, in [[1CH.21:1]], it is Satan who has done this. Certainly, the Lord can use the devil to do His bidding. Joab might be concerned about using a census to levy taxes on the people.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
